title: Phineas and Ferb
description: Immerse yourself in the world of fun and skill with the Phineas and Ferb mod, which will add characters from the animated series Phineas and Ferb to your world.Phineas, Ferb, Isabella, Baljit, Buford, Candace, Stacy, Vanessa, Norm,Dr. Heinz Doofenshmirtz.
body:
![we back](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3d30f116e07f8cd8a98fb7bc023fa5ef4c9f356d.png)
This mod is the result of several years of hard work and was made possible thanks to such fans and creators of Phineas and Ferb. If you want to express your appreciation for my work and help in the development of Phineas and Ferb, consider giving a donation to PayPal.


### 📖 About:
Phineasa and Ferb is a long-awaited mod that was made in honor of the return of Phineas and Ferb.The mod adds characters from the animated series. It boasts exclusive characters that you haven't seen yet in more than one mod for Phineas and Ferb.

The mod is still under development and not everything is in the mod, stay tuned.

The distribution of this mod on other sites is prohibited
